code: # Install from GitHub devtools::install_github("https://github.com/HealthInformaticsUT/AdherenceFromOMOP/")

title: Getting Started
text: AdherenceFromOMOP relies CDMConnector database connection options currently unavailable.
code: readRenviron("~/.Renviron")  writePrefix <- "adherencefromomop_"  db <- DBI::dbConnect(   RPostgres::Postgres(),   dbname = Sys.getenv("DB_NAME"),   host = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),   user = Sys.getenv("DB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"),   port = Sys.getenv("DB_PORT") )  cdm <- CDMConnector::cdmFromCon(   con = db,   cdmSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_CDM"),   writeSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_WRITE"),   writePrefix = writePrefix )

title: Getting Started
text: Using adherenceFromOMOP involves two main steps. First, required data must retrieved written designated table database. extract necessary data, use generateChronicDrugExposure. conceptSet input variable, expects drug_concept_id values list, recommended use CodelistGenerator. Medication groups can defined calculate adherence therapeutic category. , reuse earlier drugIngredientCodes object. compute adherence, large datasets use batched functions.
code: # Step 0 - cdm connection # for demos mock dataset is recommended cdm <- mockDrugExposure() # recommended method for acquiring drug_concept_id values drugIngredientCodes <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm = cdm, name = c(42899580, 37498042), nameStyle = "{concept_name}")  # Step 1 - data generation chronicDrugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = drugIngredientCodes,   name = "drug_exposure_demo",   overwrite = T )  chronicDrugExposure # Step 2 - calculating adherence adherence <- calculateAdherenceBatched(   drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure,   cdm = cdm,   medicationGroup = drugIngredientCodes,   name = "basic_adherence",   cma = c(     "CMA3"   ) )

title: Getting Started
text: can add features either sliding-window periods overall observation period.

code: # demo data shows only NA for avg_bmi cma_with_bmi <- addBMI(adherence, cdm)

previous_headings: Getting started with the basics > Adding features to CMA values
title: Getting Started
text: Collect necessary cohorts beforehand, example ./inst folder.
code: pathToCohorts <- paste0(getwd(), "/inst/") # path to cohort definitions  cohortSet <- CDMConnector::readCohortSet(pathToCohorts) cdm <- CDMConnector::generateCohortSet(cdm, cohortSet, name = "cohort")  cohort <- dplyr::collect(cdm$cohort)  adherence_with_cohorts_as_features <- addCohorts(adherence, cohort, cohortIdMappingToNames = cohortSet)

title: Getting Started
code: stats <- summarisePatientCounts(cdm = cdm, drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure, adherenceData = adherence)

title: Data generation
text: useful restrict adherence calculations individuals belong specific cohort. AdherenceFromOMOP supports directly cohort cohortId arguments generateChronicDrugExposure() drug exposure events satisfy following conditions included: person_id included cohort, drug_exposure_start_date falls within cohort start–end period
code: # preparation, no need to replicate cdm <- mockDrugExposure()  cohort_table <- dplyr::tibble(   cohort_definition_id = 1, subject_id = 1,   cohort_start_date = as.Date("1980-01-01"),   cohort_end_date = as.Date("2020-01-10") )  DBI::dbWriteTable(conn = CDMConnector::cdmCon(cdm), name = DBI::Id(schema = "main", table = "cohort"), value = cohort_table, append = TRUE)  cohort_ref <- dplyr::tbl(CDMConnector::cdmCon(cdm), "cohort") chronicDrugExposureCohort <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   name = "test_table",   overwrite = T,   cohort = cohort_ref,   cohortId = 1 )

title: Data generation
text: may optionally restrict included drug exposure events specific list drug_concept_id values using conceptSet argument. list can generated manually , conveniently, CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes().
code: ingredients <- c(42899580, 37498042) medicationGroups <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(   cdm = cdm,   name = ingredients,   nameStyle = "{concept_name}" )  ingredientNames <- names(medicationGroups) drug_concept_id_lst <- unlist(medicationGroups, use.names = F)

title: Calculating Adherence
text: Medication adherence calculations depend CMA (Continuous Medication Availability) measure selected. AdherenceFromOMOP supports CMA types 1–9. examples illustrating behavior different CMA types, see Intro CMA tutorial. package provides wrappers functions AdhereR package calculate adherence OMOP CDM. detailed guidance, refer AdhereR documentation. large datasets, recommended use calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched calculateAdherenceBatched, load data chunks write results directly database. AdhereR software follow-window total period relevant medication events recorded patients, observation window period within follow-window adherence actually computed. Within OMOP framework, adherence can computed two ways, depending whether cohorts used data generation: cohorts present: Cohort start/end dates define AdhereR observation window. Observation period start/end dates define AdhereR follow-window. cohorts used: observation period start/end dates define follow-observation windows.

title: Calculating Adherence
text: default, CMA values calculated using medication data available input dataset. compute adherence specific drug groups separate medications categories, medicationGroups argument can supplied. argument expects named list. recommended generate lists using CodelistGenerator package. medications overlap across groups, CMA values unaffected (data omitted). details, see medication.groups documentation AdhereR. example manually creating medication groups:
code: medicationGroup <- list(   c(1361364),   c(1830280) # vectors of drug_concept_ids ) groupNames <- c("group1", "group2")  names(medicationGroup) <- groupNames  # Optional: wrap for improved display medicationGroup <- omopgenerics::newCodelist(medicationGroup)

title: Calculating Adherence
text: used calculating adherence throughout subjects observation period.
code: results <- calculateAdherenceBatched(drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure, cdm = cdm, name = "AdherenceFromOMOP_demo_cma5", cma = c("CMA5"), medicationGroup = medicationGroup) results

title: Calculating Adherence
text: approach computes adherence series sliding windows within observation period, allowing adherence examined time. Unlike AdhereR function output, window.ID values unique across records given patient. assigned sequentially within continuous period without NA values reset gaps. Setting delayObservationWindowStart = TRUE delays start observation period used adherence calculations, case sliding-window sequence first prescription dispensed.
code: results <- calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched(drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure, cdm = cdm, name = "AdherenceFromOMOP_demo_sw", cma = c("CMA5"), delayObservationWindowStart = FALSE, medicationGroup = medicationGroup) results results_delayed <- calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched(   drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure,   cdm = cdm,   name = "AdherenceFromOMOP_demo_sw_delayed",   cma = c("CMA5"),   delayObservationWindowStart = TRUE,   # the following sets sliding window with duration of 1 year and step length of 1 year:   sliding.window.duration = 1,   sliding.window.duration.unit = c("days", "weeks", "months", "years")[4],   sliding.window.step.duration = 1,   sliding.window.step.unit = c("days", "weeks", "months", "years")[4] ) results_delayed

title: Intro to CMA
text: Medication availability based days supplied (excluding last event) Events start observation window included Requires ≥2 events Computes: sum(days_supply values except last) / (days first last event)

title: Intro to CMA
text: Medication availability including last event, using observation window end Events start observation window included Computes: sum(days_supply values) / (time first event → observation window end)

title: Intro to CMA
text: formulas CMA1 CMA2, capped 100%.

title: Intro to CMA
text: Proportion gap days relative time first last event. Equivalent 1 – CMA1 computed using theoretical use accumulated gap time. Requires ≥2 events Events start observation window included Computes: (number days covered first last event) / (days first last event) Theoretical use sample patient number 1: 30 + 90 + 90. start last event cuts length second last event. CMA1 second last event included entirely.

title: Intro to CMA
text: Proportion gap days relative time first end observation window. Equivalent 1 – CMA2 computed using theoretical use accumulated gap time. Events start observation window included Theoretical use sample patient number 1: 30 + 90 + 90 + 36.

title: Intro to CMA
text: Gap-based measure using full observation window start → end. anchoring first event. measures adherence relative entire observation period. Includes events observation period starts Theoretical use sample patient number 1: 25 + 30 + 90 + 90 + 36.

title: Intro to CMA
text: Lagged version CMA7. observation window starts short “lag” event starts observation window. Useful excluding initial adjustment period. Computes: (number days covered first event end observation window) / (lagged start end observation window) Number days accounting lagged start patient 1: 481 - 25. Theoretical use sample patient 1: 30 + 90 + 90 + 36.

title: Intro to CMA
text: Weighted daily adherence measure. method evaluates, every day, much medication supply covers day averages across entire window. Useful event timing overlaps matter substantially. Computes (number days observation window, weighted ratio days supply applicable event interval) / (start end observation window) Patient 3: ((1 - 612/702) * 306) / 481 612 number gap days end first () event end follow-window. 702 number days start first event end follow-window. 306 number days start first event end observation window. 481 total length observation window. Patient 2: ((1 - 0/30)30 + (1 - 60/180)180 + (1 - 492/522) * 126) / 481 Patient 1: ((1 - 120/180)145 + (1 - 0/30)30 + (1 - 90/180)180 + (1 - 0/90) 90 + (1 - 162/432) * 36) / 481

title: Example use cases with statins
code: readRenviron("~/.Renviron")  writePrefix <- "adherencefromomop_"  db <- DBI::dbConnect(   RPostgres::Postgres(),   dbname = Sys.getenv("DB_NAME"),   host = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),   user = Sys.getenv("DB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"),   port = Sys.getenv("DB_PORT") )  cdm <- CDMConnector::cdmFromCon(   con = db,   cdmSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_CDM"),   writeSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_WRITE"),   writePrefix = writePrefix ) statiinid <- c("Atorvastatin", "Rosuvastatin", "Simvastatin", "Pravastatin", "Fluvastatin", "Lovastatin", "Pitavastatin")

title: Example use cases with statins
text: calculate adherence medication group groups must defined first:
code: medicationGroups <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(   cdm = cdm,   name = statiinid,   nameStyle = "{concept_name}" )  ingredientNames <- names(medicationGroups) concepts <- unlist(medicationGroups, use.names = F) # generate chronic drug exposure uses conceptSet for finding suitable drugs  all_statins <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = medicationGroups,   name = "statins_study",   overwrite = T )  # if the table already exists in database all_statins <- dplyr::tbl(db, CDMConnector::inSchema(CDMConnector::cdmWriteSchema(cdm), table = "statins_study", CDMConnector::dbms(db))) adherenceCMA5 <- calculateAdherenceBatched(   drugExposure = all_statins,   cdm = cdm,   medicationGroup = medicationGroups,   name = "statins_cma5",   cma = "CMA5" )  # if the table already exists in database adherenceCMA5 <- dplyr::tbl(db, CDMConnector::inSchema(CDMConnector::cdmWriteSchema(cdm), table = "statins_cma5", CDMConnector::dbms(db)))

what: Adherence for each statin group using cohorts
title: Example use cases with statins
text: selecting people specific cohorts, use cohort table reference cohort id values.
code: # Get reference to cohort table cohort_ref <- dplyr::tbl(db, CDMConnector::inSchema("ohdsi_results_202503", "cohort", CDMConnector::dbms(db)))  all_statins_cohort <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = medicationGroups,   name = "statins_study_1688",   overwrite = T,   cohortId = 1688,   cohort = cohort_ref )  # if the table already exists in database  all_statins_cohort <- dplyr::tbl(db, CDMConnector::inSchema(CDMConnector::cdmWriteSchema(cdm), table = "statins_study_1688", CDMConnector::dbms(db)))

previous_headings: Example use cases with statins > Adherence for each statin group using cohorts
what: Combining medication groups for simvastatin and rosuvastatin
title: Example use cases with statins
code: medicationGroups <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(   cdm = cdm,   name = c("Atorvastatin", "Rosuvastatin", "Simvastatin", "Pravastatin", "Fluvastatin", "Lovastatin", "Pitavastatin"),   nameStyle = "{concept_name}" )  medicationGroups[["simvastatin_rosuvastatin"]] <- c(medicationGroups[["simvastatin"]], medicationGroups[["rosuvastatin"]])  medicationGroups[["simvastatin"]] <- NULL medicationGroups[["rosuvastatin"]] <- NULL  names(medicationGroups) adherenceCMA5 <- calculateAdherenceBatched(   drugExposure = all_statins_cohort,   cdm = cdm,   medicationGroup = medicationGroups,   name = "statins_study_1688_medgroups",   cma = "CMA5" ) adherenceCMA5SW <- calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched(   drugExposure = all_statins_cohort,   cdm = cdm,   medicationGroup = medicationGroups,   name = "statins_study_1688_medgroups_sw",   cma = "CMA5",   # the following sets sliding window with duration of 3 years and step length of 3 years:   sliding.window.duration = 3,   sliding.window.duration.unit = c("days", "weeks", "months", "years")[4],   sliding.window.step.duration = 3,   sliding.window.step.unit = c("days", "weeks", "months", "years")[4] )  adherenceCMA5SW <- dplyr::tbl(db, CDMConnector::inSchema(CDMConnector::cdmWriteSchema(cdm), table = "statins_study_1688_medgroups_sw", CDMConnector::dbms(db)))

title: Example use cases with statins
text: Adding cohorts features CMA data requires cohort table input variable. recommended use CDMConnector generating . Adding body mass index separate function. get overview function reports number individuals three groups: (1) individuals included cohort, individuals calculated adherence values, individuals least n drug exposure records within given calendar year, calculated generated drug exposure table.
code: cohortSet <- CDMConnector::readCohortSet("./inst") cdm <- CDMConnector::generateCohortSet(cdm, cohortSet, "cohort")  cohortTable <- dplyr::collect(cdm$cohort)  cma_values_with_cohort_features <- addCohorts(adherenceCMA5, cohortTable) cma_data_with_bmi <- addBMI(adherenceCMA5SW, cdm) stats <- summarisePatientCounts(   cdm = cdm,   adherenceData = adherenceCMA5SW,   drugExposure = all_statins_cohort )

title: Calculate medication adherence using data from OMOP CDM
text: Adherence concept indicates well patient follow healthcare provider’s recommendation. Medication adherence specifically shows patient follows medication regimen gaps. important medications meant consumed chronic diseases, efficacy treatment closely correlated continuity medication consumption. One possibility measure adherence secondary database analysis. AdherenceFromOMOP contains functions measure chronic medication adherence using drug_exposure table data mapped OMOP Common Data Model. package supports: generating drug exposure records cohorts /specific medications calculating medication adherence observation period calculating medication adherence using sliding window approach view specific periods observation period add cohort features columns data returned adherence functions view number people areas interest

title: Calculate medication adherence using data from OMOP CDM
code: devtools::install_github("https://github.com/HealthInformaticsUT/AdherenceFromOMOP/") library(AdherenceFromOMOP)

title: Calculate medication adherence using data from OMOP CDM

code: readRenviron("~/.Renviron")  writePrefix <- "adherencefromomop_"  db <- DBI::dbConnect(   RPostgres::Postgres(),   dbname = Sys.getenv("DB_NAME"),   host = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),   user = Sys.getenv("DB_USERNAME"),   password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"),   port = Sys.getenv("DB_PORT") )  cdm <- CDMConnector::cdmFromCon(   con = db,   cdmSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_CDM"),   writeSchema = Sys.getenv("OHDSI_WRITE"),   writePrefix = writePrefix )

title: Calculate medication adherence using data from OMOP CDM
text: Using adherenceFromOMOP involves two main steps. First, required data must retrieved written designated table database. extract necessary data, use generateChronicDrugExposure. conceptSet input variable, expects drug_concept_id values list, recommended use CodelistGenerator. multiple options calculating adherence, information check documentation.
code: # recommended method for acquiring drug_concept_id values drugIngredientCodes <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm = cdm, name = c("Atorvastatin"), nameStyle = "{concept_name}")  # Step 1 - data generation chronicDrugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = drugIngredientCodes,   name = "chronic_drug_exposure_table",   overwrite = T )  chronicDrugExposure # Step 2 adherence <- calculateAdherence(drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure, cma = c("CMA5")) adherence

title: adds bmi values to CMA values — addBMI
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() chronicDrugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   name = "chronic_drug_exposure_table",   overwrite = T ) CMA_values <- calculateAdherenceBatched(   drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure,   cdm = cdm, cma = "CMA5" ) withBMI <- addBMI(CMA_values, cdm) } # }

what: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
title: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
text: Adds cohort columns cma data

title: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
code: addCohorts(adherenceData, cohort, cohortIdMappingToNames = NULL)

title: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
text: adherenceData Database table reference data frame containing adherence calculation results, typically generated [calculateAdherence()] [calculateAdherenceSlidingWindow()]. cohort Cohort table reference -memory table columns: cohort_definition_id, subject_id, cohort_start_date, cohort_end_date. cohortIdMappingToNames (`list` `NULL`) Optional mapping cohort IDs names.

title: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
text: Reference table adherence cohort data.

title: Adds cohort columns to cma data — addCohorts
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure()  chronicDrugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(cdm = cdm, name = "chronic_drug_exposure_table", overwrite = T)  CMA_values <- calculateAdherenceBatched(drugExposure = chronicDrugExposure, cdm = cdm, cma = "CMA5")  observ_dates <- cdm$observation_period %>%   dplyr::filter(person_id == 1) %>%   dplyr::select(observation_period_start_date, observation_period_end_date) %>%   dplyr::collect()  cohortTable <- dplyr::tibble(   cohort_definition_id = 1,   subject_id = 1,   cohort_start_date = observ_dates$observation_period_start_date,   cohort_end_date = observ_dates$observation_period_end_date )  withCohort <- addCohorts(CMA_values, cohortTable) } # }

title: Calculate medication adherence — calculateAdherence
text: Calculates CMA (Continuous Medication Availability) metrics duration observation period.

title: Calculate medication adherence — calculateAdherence
code: calculateAdherence(   drugExposure,   cdm = NULL,   cma = c("CMA1", "CMA2", "CMA3", "CMA4", "CMA5", "CMA6", "CMA7", "CMA8", "CMA9"),   medicationGroup = NULL,   delayObservationWindowStart = FALSE,   cleanRows = TRUE,   ... )

title: Calculate medication adherence — calculateAdherence
text: drugExposure Database table reference data frame containing drug exposure data patient information, typically generated [generateChronicDrugExposure()]. Required columns: person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply. cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. cma (`character`) Vector CMA types calculate. Options: `"CMA1"` `"CMA9"`. See [AdhereR documentation](https://www.adherer.eu/) details CMA type. medicationGroup (`list` `NULL`) Named list element contains drug_concept_id values medication group. CMA calculated separately group. `NULL`, medications treated one group. delayObservationWindowStart (`logical(1)`) observation window start delayed first prescription? Default: `FALSE`. cleanRows (`logical(1)`) TRUE, rows NA CMA values dropped. Default: `TRUE`. ... Additional arguments passed AdhereR CMA functions.

title: Calculate medication adherence — calculateAdherence
text: Data frame adherence calculations per person medication group.

title: Calculate medication adherence — calculateAdherence
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() conceptSet <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm, name = "Atorvastatin")  drugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = conceptSet,   name = "drug_exposure" )  adherenceData <- drugExposure |>   calculateAdherence(cdm, cma = c("CMA5", "CMA7")) } # }

title: Calculate adherence (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceBatched
text: Calculates adherence batches large datasets.

title: Calculate adherence (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceBatched
code: calculateAdherenceBatched(   drugExposure,   cdm,   name = "adherenceFromOMOP_results",   cma = c("CMA1", "CMA2", "CMA3", "CMA4", "CMA5", "CMA6", "CMA7", "CMA8", "CMA9"),   medicationGroup = NULL,   batchSize = 1000,   ... )

title: Calculate adherence (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceBatched
text: drugExposure Database table reference data frame containing drug exposure data patient information, typically generated [generateChronicDrugExposure()]. Required columns: person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply. cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. name (`character(1)`) Name output table database. cma (`character`) Vector CMA types calculate. Options: `"CMA1"` `"CMA9"`. See [AdhereR documentation](https://www.adherer.eu/) details CMA type. medicationGroup (`list` `NULL`) Named list element contains drug_concept_id values medication group. CMA calculated separately group. `NULL`, medications treated one group. batchSize (`numeric(1)`) Number subjects process batch. Default: 1000. Increase better performance large datasets, decrease running memory issues. ... Additional arguments passed AdhereR CMA functions.

title: Calculate adherence (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceBatched
text: Database table reference containing adherence calculations.

title: Calculate adherence (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceBatched
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() conceptSet <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm, name = "Atorvastatin")  drugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = conceptSet,   name = "drug_exposure" )  adherenceData <- drugExposure |>   calculateAdherenceBatched(cdm, cma = "CMA5", name = "adherence_results") } # }

text: drugExposure Database table reference data frame containing drug exposure data patient information, typically generated [generateChronicDrugExposure()]. Required columns: person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply. cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. cma (`character`) Vector CMA types calculate. Options: `"CMA1"` `"CMA9"`. See [AdhereR documentation](https://www.adherer.eu/) details CMA type. medicationGroup (`list` `NULL`) Named list element contains drug_concept_id values medication group. CMA calculated separately group. `NULL`, medications treated one group. delayObservationWindowStart (`logical(1)`) observation window start delayed first prescription? Default: `FALSE`. cleanRows (`logical(1)`) TRUE, rows NA CMA values dropped window.ID reset sequential within contiguous non-NA CMA interval. Default: `TRUE`. ... Additional arguments passed AdhereR CMA_sliding_window functions.

title: Calculate adherence using sliding window approach — calculateAdherenceSlidingWindow
text: Data frame adherence calculations sliding window period.   Includes window.id, window.start, window.end, CMA values.

title: Calculate adherence using sliding window approach — calculateAdherenceSlidingWindow
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() conceptSet <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm, name = "Atorvastatin")  drugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = conceptSet,   name = "drug_exposure" )  adherenceData <- drugExposure |>   calculateAdherenceSlidingWindow(cdm, cma = c("CMA5", "CMA7")) } # }

what: Calculate adherence with sliding window approach (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched

title: Calculate adherence with sliding window approach (batched processing) — calculateAdherenceSlidingWindowBatched
text: drugExposure Database table reference data frame containing drug exposure data patient information, typically generated [generateChronicDrugExposure()]. Required columns: person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply. cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. name (`character(1)`) Name output table database. cma (`character`) Vector CMA types calculate. Options: `"CMA1"` `"CMA9"`. See [AdhereR documentation](https://www.adherer.eu/) details CMA type. medicationGroup (`list` `NULL`) Named list element contains drug_concept_id values medication group. CMA calculated separately group. `NULL`, medications treated one group. batchSize (`numeric(1)`) Number subjects process batch. Default: 1000. Increase better performance large datasets, decrease running memory issues. ... Additional arguments passed AdhereR CMA_sliding_window functions.

title: Get drug exposure entries for adherence calculations — generateChronicDrugExposure
code: generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm,   name = "adherenceFromOMOP",   conceptSet = NULL,   indexDate = "drug_exposure_start_date",   overwrite = FALSE,   subjects = NULL,   cohort = NULL,   cohortId = NULL,   ... )

title: Get drug exposure entries for adherence calculations — generateChronicDrugExposure
text: cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. name (`character(1)`) Name output table database. conceptSet (`list`, `codelist`, `NULL`) Named list drug concept IDs. Recommended use [CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes()]. `NULL`, drugs drug_exposure table included. indexDate (`character(1)`) Name column use index date patient-level calculations. Default: `"drug_exposure_start_date"`. overwrite table provided name exists, overwritten? Default: `FALSE`. subjects (`numeric` `NULL`) Optional vector person_id values restrict drug exposure data specific subjects. cohort (`tbl` `NULL`) Optional cohort table reference filter drug exposures. drug exposures subjects cohort within cohort period included. cohortId (`numeric` `NULL`) `cohort` provided, optional vector cohort_definition_id values use. `NULL`, cohorts table used. ... Additional arguments (currently unused).

title: Get drug exposure entries for adherence calculations — generateChronicDrugExposure
text: database table reference containing drug exposure records columns:   person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply, date_of_birth,   sex, date_of_death, observation_period_start_date, observation_period_end_date.   cohortSchema used, also includes cohort_start_date cohort_end_date.   Returns NULL validation fails records match criteria.

title: Get drug exposure entries for adherence calculations — generateChronicDrugExposure
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() conceptSet <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm, name = "Atorvastatin")  drugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(   cdm = cdm,   conceptSet = conceptSet,   name = "chronic_drug_exposure",   overwrite = TRUE ) } # }

what: Load and prepare data for adherence calculations — loadData
title: Load and prepare data for adherence calculations — loadData
text: Loads drug exposure data either CDM database table -memory data frame, validates required columns, computes observation window parameters needed AdhereR. Calculates observation_period_duration, followup_period_duration, observation_window_start based cohort dates (available) observation period dates.

title: Load and prepare data for adherence calculations — loadData
code: loadData(cdm, name, data, delayObservationWindowStart = FALSE)

title: Load and prepare data for adherence calculations — loadData
text: cdm cdm_reference object created CDMConnector. provided, data read database table specified name. Either cdm+name data must provided. name Character string specifying table name CDM write schema containing drug exposure data generated generateChronicDrugExposure. Required cdm provided. data -memory data frame tibble drug exposure records. Used cdm NULL. Must contain columns: person_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply, drug_concept_id. delayObservationWindowStart Logical. TRUE, observation window starts first drug exposure date patient instead observation/cohort start date. Useful sliding window calculations avoid empty initial windows. Default FALSE.

title: Load and prepare data for adherence calculations — loadData
text: Data frame original columns plus computed columns: observation_period_duration,   followup_period_duration, observation_window_start. Returns NULL validation fails.

title: Summarise patient counts — summarisePatientCounts
code: summarisePatientCounts(   adherenceData = NULL,   drugExposure = NULL,   cdm = NULL,   cohort = NULL,   cohortId = NULL,   n = 1 )

title: Summarise patient counts — summarisePatientCounts
text: adherenceData Database table reference data frame containing adherence calculation results, typically generated [calculateAdherence()] [calculateAdherenceSlidingWindow()]. drugExposure Database table reference data frame containing drug exposure data patient information, typically generated [generateChronicDrugExposure()]. Required columns: person_id, drug_concept_id, drug_exposure_start_date, days_supply. cdm (`cdm_reference`) CDM reference object created CDMConnector. cohort (`tbl` `NULL`) Optional cohort table reference additional counts. cohortId (`numeric` `NULL`) Optional vector cohort_definition_id values. n (`numeric(1)`) Minimum number rows per year person included  'Yearly drug exposure record count' table. Default: 1.

title: Summarise patient counts — summarisePatientCounts
text: Named list patient count summaries.

title: Summarise patient counts — summarisePatientCounts
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cdm <- mockDrugExposure() conceptSet <- CodelistGenerator::getDrugIngredientCodes(cdm, name = "Atorvastatin")  drugExposure <- generateChronicDrugExposure(cdm = cdm, conceptSet = conceptSet, name = "drug_exposure") adherenceData <- calculateAdherenceBatched(drugExposure, cdm, cma = "CMA5")  counts <- summarisePatientCounts(adherenceData = adherenceData, drugExposure = drugExposure, cdm = cdm) } # }
